Function.Inference: A 4-bar introduction establishes the atmosphere, ending with a |: repeat sign.
The main looped body of the track, which ends with a :| repeat sign at bar 36.

Section.Inference: Introductory section setting up the harmonic texture.
The first main theme begins, characterized by long sustained melody notes.
A contrasting theme with shifting harmony and descending melodic motion.
A dramatic new section featuring wide, flowing arpeggios in the accompaniment.
The final section of the loop, acting as a buildup to return to the beginning.
